name: Fig Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the figs well.
2. Add eggs, sugar, and margarine to the bowl. Mix until combined.
3. Gradually add buttermilk, soda, salt, cinnamon, allspice, vanilla, flour, and nuts. Stir until just mixed.
4. Pour the batter into a greased glass baking dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
